mapper.select: SELECT id, member_name AS memberName, phone, join_date AS joinDate, expire_date AS expireDate, memo FROM sf_membership ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, member_name AS memberName, phone, join_date AS joinDate, expire_date AS expireDate, memo FROM sf_membership WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_membership (member_name, phone, join_date, expire_date, memo) VALUES (#{memberName}, #{phone}, #{joinDate}, #{expireDate}, #{memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE sf_membership SET member_name = #{memberName}, phone = #{phone}, join_date = #{joinDate}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, memo = #{memo} WHERE id = #{id}
